content_goal: Gioi thieu luoi chan rac inox cho bon rua bat — gadget nho giup giu cong thoat khong tac va de don rau cu thua sau khi rua.
tone: chia se trai nghiem, nhe nhang, satisfying, khong quang cao tho
affiliate_angle: Luoi chan rac bep inox tron, hero product single SKU, pho thong tren Shopee VN, gia mem.
cta_style: soft — gan link bio, khong ep mua

scene_timeline.visual_summary: Close-up luoi chan rac inox tron tren mat da bep — sang, bong, ro chi tiet luoi mesh.
scene_timeline.notes: Frame 001. Co text overlay nguon 'COOL KITCHEN GADGET' + brand 'WOKDADA' tren san pham. GUARD 6 repair: blur top + center region trong window nay.

scene_timeline.visual_summary: Bon rua inox doi, rau spinach va qua mong nho do roi vai tren thanh sink, cong thoat ho — trang thai BEFORE de minh hoa van de.
Tay bat cong tac den tren tuong nha bep — shot transition, khong co san pham trong frame.
scene_timeline.notes: Frame 003. OFF_TOPIC = SILENT intent (khong narration), Voice Sync se auto-skip block nay.

scene_timeline.visual_summary: Sink dang co nuoc + rau vun quanh drain — tinh trang truoc khi gan luoi chan, sap minh hoa van de tac cong.
Tay cam luoi chan rac inox dua xuong drain — chuan bi lap dat, san pham hien ro trong frame.
scene_timeline.notes: Frame 005. Demo install — visual rat ro.

scene_timeline.visual_summary: Luoi chan da nam dung vi tri tren mieng drain, rau spinach + qua mong roi xuong va bi giu lai tren be mat luoi — proof gadget hoat dong.
Tay nhac luoi chan len, ke theo cum rau spinach da hung — minh hoa thao tac don rac don gian.
scene_timeline.notes: Frame 007. After demo, ket qua thay duoc.

scene_timeline.visual_summary: Ket frame, sink da sach — luc moi nguoi xem link san pham.
scene_timeline.notes: CTA-only block. Cap 7 tu HARD. VIET DUNG CTA NGAN: vi du 'Link o mo ta nha' (5 tu) hoac 'Link bio cua minh nha' (5 tu). KHONG mo ta canh, KHONG mo ta san pham, KHONG dung tu tuyet doi (tot nhat / re nhat / so 1).
